steps.title: Eliminate a by subtracting equations
steps.content:
Both equations contain $2a$, so subtract the second equation from the first to eliminate this variable:

$$(2a + 8b) - (2a + 4b) = 198 - 98$$

The $2a$ terms cancel:

$$4b = 100$$

steps.title: Solve for b
steps.content:
Divide both sides by 4:

$$b = \frac{100}{4} = 25$$

The value of $b$ is 25.
